case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARGARITA DE JESUS MAGANA TUN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST S PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARGARITA DE JESUS MAGANA TUN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
